Used to build new building as well as invoke chaos units."/> <entry name="ChaosGuard/RequisitionsHint" value="Requisitions
Used to construct imperial buildings as well as produce and maintain renegade guard units."/> <entry name="khorneguard/InfluenceHint" value="Influence (Khorne Favor)
